The party consists of 1 adult(s). Person 1 is not a repeated guest and has 0 previous cancellation(s). They have requested 0 car parking space(s) and made 2 special request(s).

A decision tree trained on this dataset finds that when the booking was made 30 to 90 days in advance, 62% of bookings were kept.

TASK: Predict Person 1's booking decision. Explain your reasoning in 1 sentence. Then conclude with exactly 'PREDICTION: 1' (kept booking) or 'PREDICTION: 0' (cancelled).

You are helping predict Person 1's hotel booking decision. Person 1 has booked a hotel stay arriving on February 22, 2017 (week 8), with 2 weekend night(s) and 5 weekday night(s). The party consists of 2 adult(s). Person 1 is not a repeated guest and has 0 previous cancellation(s). They have requested 1 car parking space(s) and made 2 special request(s).

A decision tree trained on this dataset finds that when the booking was made 30 to 90 days in advance, 62% of bookings were kept.

TASK: Predict Person 1's booking decision. Explain your reasoning in 1 sentence. Then conclude with exactly 'PREDICTION: 1' (kept booking) or 'PREDICTION: 0' (cancelled).

Explain your reasoning in 1-2 sentences, then conclude with exactly 'DECISION: 0' (implement) or 'DECISION: 1' (escalate).

PREDICTION: 1
